description: Django web application with REST framework and async support
review_checklist: Verify all packages exist on PyPI
Check for known CVEs in pinned versions
Check for packages with suspicious metadata

ground_truth.description: Typosquat: 'djang-extensions' is a misspelling of the popular 'django-extensions' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
Package 'python-dateutil-parser' does not exist on PyPI. This is likely a hallucinated or malicious package name.
pyyaml 5.3.1 has CVE-2020-14343: arbitrary code execution via untrusted YAML input when using yaml.load() without a safe Loader.
urllib3 1.26.5 has CVE-2023-45803: request body not stripped after redirect from 303 status, potentially leaking sensitive data to unintended endpoints.
